caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Bring Rain
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing an 88% rain probability with winds of 14 kt and wave heights of 4.7 ft, while St. Thomas is seeing winds of 21 kt. I am monitoring these conditions closely as they may impact port operations in the Eastern Caribbean, particularly in Barbados and St. Thomas.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing 21 kt winds with 3.8 ft wave heights and less than 10% rain probability, while Naples has 14 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail with the dominant swell direction from the west, impacting maritime activities in these ports.
